consent.title: Data Protection
consent.text: Compatibility matching is performed instantly and securely. Academic data submitted for the simulation is strictly anonymised in our database. Related information requests are routed ephemerally via secure email, with no persistent storage of your personal data on our servers.
consent.checkbox: I accept the terms of use and privacy policy, and I consent to the processing of my data in accordance with Law 09-08 (CNDP Declarative Regime).
consent.transient: Secure routing with no storage of personal data
consent.delete: Right to deletion at any time

admission.cnc.label: CPGE + CNC
admission.tafem.label: TAFEM Exam
admission.concours.label: Entrance Exam
admission.dossier.label: Application + Interview
admission.direct.label: Open Enrollment
admission.cnc.title: CPGE Track + CNC Examination
admission.cnc.step1: Enrol in a scientific preparatory class (MP / PSI / MPSI / TSI) after your Bac — selected by academic record with Merit or Distinction.
admission.cnc.step2: Study for 2 years (MP1, MP2 or PSI1, PSI2 classes).
admission.cnc.step3: Sit the National Common Examination (CNC) at the end of year 2. Grades from both years are taken into account.
admission.cnc.step4: Ranked among 4,000–6,000 national candidates. Top performers enter EMI, EHTP, ENSIAS, INPT, etc.
admission.cnc.footer: CPGE application: cursussup.gov.ma · CNC results: mcs.ac.ma
admission.bac.title: Direct Bac Admission (Tawjihi Platform)
admission.bac.formula.label: Selection formula 75/25:
admission.bac.formula.note: The regional score corresponds to continuous assessment grades (assignments & regional exams).
admission.bac.step1: Obtain your Bac with the required average (min. grade: {{grade}}/20).
admission.bac.step2: Apply on cursussup.gov.ma or tawjihi.ma as soon as results are published.
admission.bac.step3: Selection is by ranking using the 75/25 formula. Places are limited.
admission.bac.step4: Confirm your choice within the deadline (typically 72h after placement).
admission.tafem.title: TAFEM Examination (ENCG)
admission.tafem.step1: Pre-selection by Bac application via cursussup.gov.ma (minimum threshold varies by campus).
admission.tafem.step2: Written TAFEM exam: General culture, Mathematics, Logic, Economics (3 hours).
admission.tafem.step3: Oral / motivation interview for shortlisted candidates.
admission.tafem.step4: Final ranking = Bac grade + TAFEM score + oral score.
admission.dossier.title: Application-Based Admission + Interview
admission.dossier.step1: Check application opening dates on the school's official website.
admission.dossier.step2: Prepare your application: Bac transcripts, motivation letter, CV, test results (SAT/ACT for some schools).
admission.dossier.step3: Sit the motivation interview or the school's admission test.
admission.dossier.step4: Await the decision and respond within the deadline.
admission.direct.title: Direct Bac Enrollment
admission.direct.step1: Obtain your Bac in the relevant track.
admission.direct.step2: Enrol directly at the faculty after Bac results are published.
admission.direct.step3: Bring required documents: Bac pass certificate, national ID, passport photos, medical file.
admission.direct.step4: Choose your branch/specialisation at enrolment. Some tracks may have limited places.
